pubmed_links: [Marangi et al. (2013) Interstitial deletion of 3p22.3p22.2 encompassing ARPP21 and CLASP2 as a pathogenic factor for syndromic intellectual disability](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24127197/)
summary: CLASP2, a microtubule-associated protein critical for synapse formation and neuronal polarity, has been implicated as a candidate gene for syndromic intellectual disability through chromosomal deletions at 3p22.3p22.2. (novel candidate)
